mapper.sql: id, message_id, consumer_group, topic, business_key, status, error_msg, retry_count, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.update: UPDATE mq_message_idempotency SET status = #{status}, error_msg = #{errorMsg}, update_time = NOW() WHERE message_id = #{messageId} AND consumer_group = #{consumerGroup} AND deleted = 0
